Package Algorithm

Class VoronoiEngineStub

java.lang.Object
Algorithm.VoronoiEngineStub
All Implemented Interfaces:
VoronoiEngine
public class VoronoiEngineStub extends Object implements VoronoiEngine
Stub implementation of the Voronoi engine with fake data.
